Gherkin Specs

RegenTribes living specifications

← All Specs

Integral Collective Five-Subsystem Operations

As an Integral Collective node I want all five subsystems operating in coordinated sequence So that governance, strategy, innovation, and resource allocation work as one coherent system
@regen-tribes @integral-collective @OAD-ITC-CDS-COS-FRS
Scenario OAD drives ITC to identify innovation opportunity
GivenOAD: Open Architecture Design (strategy layer)
AndITC: Integral TRIZ Constructor (innovation layer)
AndCDS: Collective Decision System (governance layer)
AndCOS: Commons Operating System (resource layer)
AndFRS: Federation Rules System (protocol layer)
GivenOAD identifies a regeneration gap in water management
WhenOAD sends strategic assessment to ITC
ThenITC applies TRIZ contradiction analysis
Andidentifies novel solutions using 40 inventive principles
Andreturns solution candidates to OAD
Scenario ITC triggers CDS for governance decision
GivenOAD: Open Architecture Design (strategy layer)
AndITC: Integral TRIZ Constructor (innovation layer)
AndCDS: Collective Decision System (governance layer)
AndCOS: Commons Operating System (resource layer)
AndFRS: Federation Rules System (protocol layer)
GivenITC proposes a novel water management approach
WhenITC sends solution proposal to CDS
ThenCDS runs consensus-building across participants
Andevaluates evidence-based performance criteria
Andreturns governance approval or refinement requests
Scenario CDS assigns to COS for resource operation
GivenOAD: Open Architecture Design (strategy layer)
AndITC: Integral TRIZ Constructor (innovation layer)
AndCDS: Collective Decision System (governance layer)
AndCOS: Commons Operating System (resource layer)
AndFRS: Federation Rules System (protocol layer)
GivenCDS approves the water management approach
WhenCDS assigns the task to COS
ThenCOS tracks resource allocation for the task
AndCOS monitors resource usage against plan
AndCOS reports resource metrics to CDS
Scenario COS realizes through FRS protocol compliance
GivenOAD: Open Architecture Design (strategy layer)
AndITC: Integral TRIZ Constructor (innovation layer)
AndCDS: Collective Decision System (governance layer)
AndCOS: Commons Operating System (resource layer)
AndFRS: Federation Rules System (protocol layer)
GivenCOS allocates resources for the water project
Whenthe protocol runs through FRS
ThenFRS validates compliance with federation rules
AndFRS checks Ostrom principle alignment
AndFRS reports compliance status to COS
Scenario FRS influences OAD for next cycle
GivenOAD: Open Architecture Design (strategy layer)
AndITC: Integral TRIZ Constructor (innovation layer)
AndCDS: Collective Decision System (governance layer)
AndCOS: Commons Operating System (resource layer)
AndFRS: Federation Rules System (protocol layer)
GivenFRS completes compliance validation
WhenFRS sends feedback to OAD
ThenOAD incorporates outcomes into next strategy cycle
Andthe five-subsystem loop continues
Andthe system evolves through evidence-based feedback
Scenario Egregore competition within Integral Collective
GivenOAD: Open Architecture Design (strategy layer)
AndITC: Integral TRIZ Constructor (innovation layer)
AndCDS: Collective Decision System (governance layer)
AndCOS: Commons Operating System (resource layer)
AndFRS: Federation Rules System (protocol layer)
Givenmultiple Egregores proposing different approaches
Wheneach Egregore's approach is measured on outcomes
Theninfluence flows to what's working
Andlosing approaches fade and stop replicating
Andsuccessful approaches gain influence and spread
Andno single Egregore can dominate
Scenario Post-monetary exchange within COS
GivenOAD: Open Architecture Design (strategy layer)
AndITC: Integral TRIZ Constructor (innovation layer)
AndCDS: Collective Decision System (governance layer)
AndCOS: Commons Operating System (resource layer)
AndFRS: Federation Rules System (protocol layer)
Givencommunity members contribute to commons
Whenthe contribution is verified by CDS evidence
ThenCOS records the contribution as value
Andvalue flows back as resource access rights
Andno traditional currency is required for exchange

Generated from wiki synthesis · validated with ghokin · deployed via GitHub Actions
